questionHtml:
Which functional groups are present in serine?

A.  nitro, carbonyl and carboxyl

B.  amino, hydroxyl and carbonyl

C.  nitro, carboxyl and hydroxyl

D.  amino, carboxyl and hydroxyl

meta.title: Which functional groups are present in serine? A. nitro, carbonyl and carboxyl B. amino, hydroxyl and carbonyl C. nitro, carboxyl and hydroxyl D. amino, carboxyl and hydroxyl
